concerns.text: Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) is marked 'PASS' with the note: 'Lee & See (2004) citation will be validated...'. The plan does not specify a mechanism or step to perform this validation before data collection begins. Principle II mandates that citations MUST be verified by the Reference-Validator Agent before contributing review points or advancing stages. A plan that defers this mandatory gate to an undefined future step violates the 'Verified Accuracy' requirement.

Constitution Principle V (Versioning Discipline) is marked 'PASS' with the note: 'Content hashes for all artifacts; state/projects/PROJ-286-*.yaml updated on artifact changes.' The plan lacks a defined step or script to automatically update the `state/projects/PROJ-286-*.yaml` file upon artifact modification. Without an explicit implementation step (e.g., a CI hook or post-commit script), this principle cannot be enforced, violating the 'Versioning Discipline' requirement.

FR-002 is mapped to 'code/experiment/app.py' for capturing trust scale items. However, SC-004 (Success Criteria) requires that 'Trust scale items... match Lee & See (2004) verbatim'. The plan does not explicitly reference a contract or validation step in the FR/SC matrix that ensures the `app.py` implementation is validated against the `participant.schema.yaml` or a specific 'Trust Scale Contract' to guarantee verbatim compliance. While implied, the explicit traceability to a validation contract is missing.
